name: Chicken Granville
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook artichokes according to package directions, then drain.
2. Arrange the cooked artichokes in a greased baking dish.
3. Brown the chicken cutlets in oil.
4. Place the browned chicken on top of the artichokes in the dish.
5. In a separate bowl, combine the soup, mayonnaise, and lemon juice.
6. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
7. Sprinkle shredded cheese evenly over the top.
8. Combine the bread crumbs with melted butter.
9. Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the entire dish.
10. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes.
11. Serves 6-8 people.
